title: Senior Software Engineer - Backend
summary: Tech Mahindra is hiring a Backend Developer to work on high-impact engineering - software initiatives. Work with a talented team using Java, Spring Boot, Microservices in a office setup.
descriptionMd:
## About the role

We are looking for a **Senior Software Engineer - Backend** to join Tech Mahindra in Noida, Pune. You will collaborate with cross-functional teams to build and scale products used by millions across India.

This is a office role suited for someone with 4-8 years of experience and hands-on expertise in Java, Spring Boot, Microservices, SQL, AWS.

### What you'll do

- Design, build, and maintain reliable, scalable solutions.
- Partner with product and design to ship customer-focused features.
- Write clean, well-tested, maintainable code and review peers' work.
- Continuously improve performance, quality, and developer experience.

### What we're looking for

- B.Tech/B.E. or equivalent practical experience.
- Strong fundamentals and proven experience with Java, Spring Boot, Microservices.
- Excellent communication and a collaborative, ownership-driven mindset.
responsibilities: Own end-to-end delivery of engineering - software features.
Apply Java and Spring Boot to solve real customer problems.
Collaborate across product, design, and engineering teams.
Mentor peers and uphold a high bar for quality.
